name: semifluid
description: Search, inspect, and manage Semifluid collections, schemas, records, attachments, and suggestions from Codex through authenticated Semifluid plugin tools.

interface.longDescription: Adds Semifluid guidance for authenticated collection, schema, record, attachment, event, intake form, webhook, and suggestion operations, plus a bundled HTTP helper for public endpoints and explicit compatibility credentials.
defaultPrompt: List all my collections by name
How many collections do I have?
